name: story-skills
description: A suite of cross-referenced skills for end-to-end story writing powered by markdown. Covers story initialization, character management, worldbuilding, plot structure, and chapter writing.

interface.shortDescription: Plan stories, manage characters and worlds, and write chapters.
interface.longDescription: Story Skills adds end-to-end fiction-writing workflows for Codex: story initialization, character management, worldbuilding, plot structure, and chapter writing with markdown registries and YAML frontmatter.
